# assets/

Place `logo.svg` here before running the build pipeline.

The build pipeline (`setup/build.py`) will generate:
- `UltraVivid.ico` — multi-resolution Windows icon (generated from SVG)

## Required file

- `logo.svg` — application icon source (tracked in git)

## Generated files

- `UltraVivid.ico` — generated by `setup/svg_to_ico.py` from `logo.svg` (gitignored, rebuilt on each build)
